results.rendered_html:
ṛtuśas (von ṛtu) adv. regelrecht, gehörig: yaddhaviṣyamṛtuśo devayānaṃ trirmānuṣāḥ paryaśvaṃ nayanti  ṚV. 1,162,4 . yajiṣṭho devā~ ṛtuśo yajāti 10,2,5 .  VS. 23,57 . ā rodasī apṛṇādota madhyaṃ pañca devā~ ṛtuśaḥ sapta  ṚV. 10,55,3 . vidvānpatha ṛtuśo devayānān 98,11 . sa parvabhirṛtuśaḥ kalpamānaḥ  VS. 13,43 .  AV. 9,5,13 . upa devā~ ṛtuśo pātha etu  VS. 29,10 .
— Vgl. ṛtuthā.
